summary: Julia Evans announces a new zine about Linux tracing tools, created as a companion to a previous blog post on the topic. The zine is 12 pages and available in both a digital reading version and a print version. It's a characteristically quick, visual format for making Linux tracing concepts accessible.
key_points: The zine distills the content from her longer Linux tracing tools blog post into a concise visual format
Available in two formats: a screen-readable PDF and a print-ready version
Demonstrates her iterative approach to technical education — blog post first, then zine
money_quotes: I wrote a really quick zine out of the linux tracing tools post from yesterday.
key_insight: Complex technical topics like Linux tracing can be distilled into short, visual zine formats to make them more accessible.
